report.title: UKSI taxa for TanHub
report.description: A list of UKSI taxa for TanHub.
report.query: -- We want to return all taxa, for the correct list, that are preferred, allow data entry and in one of the configured ranks. -- Include taxa for any taxon group, as long as it is a parent of one of the taxa for one of the configured groups. WITH all_ttlids AS ( SELECT DISTINCT cttl.id FROM cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttlc JOIN cache_taxon_paths ctp ON ctp.taxon_meaning_id=cttlc.taxon_meaning_id JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.taxon_meaning_id=ANY(ctp.path) AND cttl.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# AND cttl.preferred=true AND cttl.allow_data_entry=true AND cttl.taxon_rank IN (#taxon_ranks#) WHERE cttlc.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# AND cttlc.allow_data_entry=true #filters# ) SELECT #columns# FROM cache_taxa_Taxon_lists cttl JOIN taxon_groups tg ON tg.id=cttl.taxon_group_id AND tg.deleted=false JOIN cache_taxon_paths ctp ON ctp.taxon_meaning_id=cttl.taxon_meaning_id LEFT JOIN (cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttlp JOIN recording_scheme_taxa rst ON rst.organism_key=cttlp.organism_key AND rst.deleted=false JOIN recording_schemes rs ON rs.id=rst.recording_scheme_id AND rs.deleted=false ) ON cttlp.taxon_meaning_id=ANY(ctp.path) AND cttlp.preferred=true LEFT JOIN (taxa_taxon_designations ttd JOIN taxon_designations td ON td.id=ttd.taxon_designation_id AND td.deleted=false JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=td.category_id AND t.term='GB Red List' ) ON ttd.taxon_id=cttl.taxon_id AND ttd.deleted=false WHERE cttl.id IN (SELECT id FROM all_ttlids)

param.name: taxon_list_id
param.description: ID of the taxon list to load taxa for.

param.name: taxon_ranks
param.description: Ranks of the taxa to load, quoted CSV.

param.name: taxon_group_ids
param.description: Optional taxon groups of the taxa to load, comma separated IDs.

column.name: higher_taxa
column.sql: (select json_agg(json_build_object('organism_key', ht.organism_key, 'taxon', ht.taxon, 'taxon_rank', ht.taxon_rank) order by ht.taxon_rank_sort_order, ht.id) FROM cache_taxa_taxon_lists ht WHERE ht.taxon_meaning_id=ANY(ctp.path) AND ht.preferred=true AND ht.taxon_rank IN (#taxon_ranks#))
